steps.title: Compare the two arguments
steps.content: Text 1 says graphic novels rely mostly on images and use language only sparingly. Text 2 counters that captions and dialogue are essential to understanding the images and can be beautifully written.

steps.title: Reject concessions
steps.content: B says Text 2 would acknowledge a flaw in all graphic novels, but Text 2 defends them. C shifts to plot difficulty, which Text 2 does not discuss. D says Text 2 agrees with Text 1 about craft, which it does not. The answer is A.
